release_notes:
- NEW: Smart in-app updater with real-time progress bar
- NEW: Shows download percentage (0% to 100%)
- NEW: Auto-installs after download completes
- NEW: Auto-restarts app after installation
- NEW: Seamless update experience - no system installer prompts
- IMPROVED: Works perfectly in Device Owner mode
- IMPROVED: 5-minute cooldown prevents update loops
- IMPROVED: Installation tracking prevents duplicate updates
